# terrible_hostname (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `name` (String) Name of the host. If the value is a fully qualified domain name that does not resolve from the given host, this will cause the module to hang for a few seconds while waiting for the name resolution attempt to timeout.

### Optional

- `use` (String) Which strategy to use to update the hostname. If not set we try to autodetect, but this can be problematic, particularly with containers as they can present misleading information. Note that `systemd` should be specified for RHEL/EL/CentOS 7+. Older distributions should use `redhat`.
